China will send 405 athletes, including 42 Olympic champions, to the upcoming Paris Olympic Games. The delegation includes 37-year-old race walker Liu Hong, who is embarking on her fifth Olympic journey and will be the oldest athlete. Despite her advancing age, Liu is determined to push herself to the limit and win gold.
